TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Omar al-Bashir ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Omar al-Bashir, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Sudan ta' misuw hya' ga Omar al-Bashir, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1993 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: omar al-ő≤as~…ēńßir rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, omar al-ő≤as~…ēńßir, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw s~…ēu*an ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a omar al-ő≤as~…ēńßir, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Omar al-Bashir ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 1, Omar al-Bashir, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Sudan ta' misuw hya' ga Omar al-Bashir, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 1993 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: omar al-ő≤as~…ēńßir rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, omar al-ő≤as~…ēńßir, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw s~…ēu*an ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a omar al-ő≤as~…ēńßir, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
